title: Legacy Crafting Add-On
description: Adds items from Twilight Forest, The Aether, Mutant Monsters, Biomes O' Plenty, Friends&Foes, BossCraft, Waystones, Comforts, Small Ships, Easy Emerald Tools, and Dis-Enchanting Table to Legacy4J's Crafting Menu.
body:
# About The Legacy Crafting Add-On enhances the Legacy4J mod by expanding the Legacy Crafting Menu with new items, blocks, and recipes, improving accessibility and modded gameplay variety in Minecraft. This resource pack integrates additional content, offering players a seamless way to craft items from various mods directly within the Legacy Crafting Menu. # Credits **[WilyIcaro](https://modrinth.com/user/Wilyicaro)** - For providing the newer version of the legacy crafting JSON seen in the resource pack.
**[psychoshay1](https://modrinth.com/user/psychoshay1)** - The original creator of the Add-on.
**Goldenfreddy0703** - Provided placeholder screenshot, organized JSON items, and added support for Biomes O' Plenty and Friends&Foes.
**lilnotmasterr** - Added support for Easy Emerald Tools, BossCraft Respawn (Unofficial Port & Overlord), Waystones, Comforts, Small Ships, and Dis-Enchanting Table. ---
